prestazioni: VR6 12V (AAA engine code) forced induction conversion using a Garrett GT2860R-5 turbocharger (0.86 A/R turbine housing) with a custom Precision Turbo wastegate (44mm) and a front-mounted GReddy intercooler (FMIC) kit, paired with a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump and Siemens DEKA 60lb/hr injectors for 300+ HP on 98 RON fuel

Full 3.6L VR6 stroker kit (Mahle forged pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, and a 3.6L crankshaft) with ARP head studs and a Schrick 268/272 camshaft upgrade, mated to a 6-speed VR6-specific Getrag transmission with a Peloquin limited-slip differential (LSD) and a Sachs Performance clutch (single-disc, 240mm)

Custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Supersprint 4-2-1 header (equal-length primaries) and a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler (straight-through design), paired with a Milltek Sport catalytic converter (200-cell) for Euro 5 compliance and a Vibrant 1794 resonator for drone reduction
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated tow hooks, and a carbon fiber duckbill spoiler) with a 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and OEM+ Storm-specific badging (red/black accents)

OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (8.5x16 ET35 front, 9.5x16 ET32 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (205/45/16 front, 225/45/16 rear) and H&R Sport lowering springs (35mm drop) paired with Bilstein B8 shocks for improved handling

Full interior retrim with Recaro SRD-E seats (black leather with red Alcantara inserts), a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a custom Storm-themed gauge cluster overlay (red LED backlighting) with a Defi Advance BF gauges (boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR)
